description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named pages that runs in the default (or deploy) stage on the master branch only. The job uses the default Docker image, executes the shell commands: mkdir .public, cp index.html .public, cp LICENSE .public/LICENSE, cp -r src/ .public/src/, cp -r assets/ .public/assets/, and mv .public public. It then publishes the resulting public/ directory as an artifact by specifying artifacts.paths: public. The job is restricted to the master branch via an only rule.
